name: Playtest 6: The Gauntlet
description:
TESTS: Passive equipment bonuses (AC from plate+shield+Ring of Protection), feat effects (Alert +5 initiative, Mobile +10 speed), stat modifier aggregation, resource costs (ki points, divine smite deducting on use), actions graying out when resources depleted, AC calculation stacking.

A Paladin (heavy armor + equipment bonuses) and a Monk (ki resource pool + Mobile feat) take on three properly-statted ogres. Watch for: Paladin AC should be very high, Monk speed should be 50 ft, Stunning Strike should cost ki, Smite Strike should cost divine_smite.
